world.title: Democrats join calls to expel Eric Swalwell from Congress over misconduct claims

world.title: Hungary's incoming PM Péter Magyar demands 'Orbán's puppets' leave office
world.description: Hungary's incoming PM Péter Magyar said he plans to visit Brussels in a bid to get billions in frozen EU funds unlocked as he vows to restore system of checks and balances.

world.title: How Hungary's Péter Magyar went from Viktor Orbán's ally to ending his 16-year rule

world.title: Goliath's Curse: Why American Power Makes Iran More Resistant, Not Less
world.description: 21 hours of talks in Islamabad produced nothing. Vance called it a "final and best offer." Iran said no. The reason is structural: Iraq disarmed and was overthrown. Libya disarmed and Gaddafi was killed. Ukraine disarmed and was invaded. Iran watched all three and drew the obvious conclusion.

world.title: Stocks drop, oil jumps on US plan to block Strait of Hormuz
world.description: Oil surged while stocks and bonds fell on Monday as a brief bout of market optimism unravelled after US President Donald Trump ordered a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions with Iran after weekend peace talks collapsed.

science.title: Artemis II: Uniting America Through Space Exploration
science.description: A major leap in space exploration, Artemis II's successful moon mission has captured the imagination of Americans across all divides. From inspiring young astronauts to proving Russian rockets ready, space endeavors unify and give hope. This journey highlights a renewed fascination with outer space and its boundless possibilities.

science.title: Scientists Found Strange "Modern" Structures on the Arctic Seafloor That Should Not Physically Exist
